cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel a pending order and refund collateral

closePosition(uint256,bytes[]).notice: Close an open position at the current oracle price

executeOrder(uint256,bytes[]).notice: Execute a pending order (called by keeper/bot)

liquidate(uint256,bytes[]).notice: Liquidate an undercollateralized position (anyone can call)

openPosition(bytes32,bool,uint256,uint25.notice: Open a new perpetual position at the current oracle price

placeOrder(bytes32,bool,uint256,uint256,.notice: Place a pending order (limit or stop market)
